Annual (2017-2023) pan-European mapping of primary crops at a spatial resolution of 10 m and a MMU of 0.25 ha.
Satellite derived crop type classification for three consecutive growing seasons.

categories.label: Beans, Peas,  Lentil, Hose Peas, Chick Peas

meta.description: Comparison of crops in subsequent years to see which areas have crop rotation and which have the same crops.
Detection of the presence of catch crops between the main seasons.
Analysis of crop maps to see which areas have not bee subject to crop rotation.

Same crops without presence of catch crop

meta.description: Declaration of erosion risk level.
Identify areas where crops are not being rotated in line as required by anti-erosion rules.

meta.description: Global maps of spring cereals for 2021, at 10m resolution.
Global maps of winter cereals for 2021, at 10m resolution.
Global maps of maize for 2021, at 10m resolution.
Global maps of temporary crops for 2021, at 10m resolution. This identifies pieces of land that are sowed/planted and harvestable at least once within the 12 months after the sowing/planting date.

AI-detected 
Tillage events at selected parcels across Estonia (2018–2022), detected by AI and satellite data. This shows the dates when tillage occurred as well as whether it was done with conventional or conservation methods.
Satellite-derived vegetation index (NDVI) from Sentinel-2. Indicates vegetation density and photosynthetic activity. Time series available.
Annual (2017-2023) pan-European mapping of secondary crops at a spatial resolution of 10 m and a MMU of 0.25 ha.
Water level trend over the period 2017-24 (in mm/yr).

Satellite-derived Fraction of Absorbed Photosynthetically Active Radiation (FAPAR) from Sentinel-2.
Indicates vegetation photosynthetic activity and plant productivity.
Time series available.
Annual (2017-2023) pan-European level amapping of the presence of fallow land over cropland, at a spatial resolution of 10 m and a MMU of 0.25 ha
Water level trend over the period 2017-24 (in mm/yr).
Classification of the types of forests
Pan-European measurements of tree cover density (0% to 100%)
Shows the change in tree cover between 2018 and 2021.
Growing stock volume (m³/ha)in 20 m spatial resolution estimated using Sentinel-1 and ALOS 2 PALSAR 2 data.
Above ground biomass (AGB) (t/ha) at 20 m spatial resolution estimated using Sentinel-1 and ALOS 2 PALSAR 2 data.
Below ground biomass (BGB) (t/ha) at 20 m spatial resolution estimated using Sentinel-1 and ALOS 2 PALSAR 2 data.
Annual (2017-2023) pan-European mapping of primary crops at a spatial resolution of 10 m and a MMU of 0.25 ha.
Annual (2017-2023) pan-European mapping of secondary crops at a spatial resolution of 10 m and a MMU of 0.25 ha.
Shows the crop type diversity (number of different crops) over a 3 year period.
Shows areas where trees are used for agricultural practices, or in urban areas
Satellite-derived Leaf Area Index (LAI) from Sentinel-2. Indicates density of vegetation canopy. Time series available.
Satellite-derived Fraction of Green Vegetaion Cover (FCOVER) from Sentinel-2. Indicates fraction of ground covered by green vegetation.
